purpose: Round 397 PromotionRound promoted exactly one release user-guide page: full_site/release/user_guides/schemas/usdLux/ShadowAPI.html. The page was compared against https://openusd.org/release/user_guides/schemas/usdLux/ShadowAPI.html and the local source snapshot source/full_release/user_guides/schemas/usdLux/ShadowAPI_source.html, then upgraded from bilingual_draft to bilingual_complete with Chinese main-reading-path coverage for all five official inputs:shadow:* properties, non-physical shadow-control boundaries, LightAPI shadow-linking distinction, renderer support caveats, and debugging flow. This round increased good_bilingual from 97 to 98 and review_ready_zh from 34 to 35.

problems.summary: The promotion path now raises completion to 98/406, but the remaining 308 draft pages still need real upgrades.
problems.evidence: reports/bilingual_completion_promotions.json records 90 promoted pages; discover_openusd_all_pages.mjs reports bilingual_complete=98, and audit_openusd_translation_quality.mjs reports good_bilingual=98.
problems.required_action: Continue using the promotion manifest only for pages with paragraph-level bilingual coverage and draft-marker removal; do not mark guide-only drafts as complete.

problems.summary: The final entry must keep completed and draft counts aligned with inventory, quality, and problem audit.
problems.evidence: openusd_bilingual_final.html is rebuilt from inventory and shows 98 complete pages and 308 incomplete drafts; validation_report passed=true with failed_check_count=0.
problems.required_action: Keep final-entry counts and completed-page tables dynamic; keep bilingual_draft clearly described as incomplete translation.

problems.summary: The old heartbeat automation optimized for repeated 5-page refinement and GitHub sync rather than real completion progress.
problems.evidence: The openusd heartbeat uses PromotionRound/DefectRound/ConsistencyRound and requires good_bilingual growth or named P0/P1 fixes before push.
problems.required_action: Keep the automation prompt aligned with current counts and the promotion mechanism; do not let it regress to count-neutral round-churn.

problems.summary: Fixed in round 396 and preserved in round 397: completed full_site pages expose a real local reading path with side navigation, breadcrumb, local release/API entrances, related pages, previous/next links, and explicit official-source jumps.
problems.evidence: reports/reading_flow_navigation_audit.json reports completed_full_site_pages=90, pages_with_side_nav=90, pages_with_breadcrumb=90, release_pages_with_release_entry=21/21, api_pages_with_api_entry=69/69, sample_paths_passed=8/8, official_leak_count=0.
problems.required_action: Keep inject_openusd_reading_flow_navigation.mjs and audit_openusd_reading_flow_navigation.mjs in the validation chain whenever promoted pages or navigation status changes.

problems.summary: Human-facing progress Markdown had been damaged by Windows encoding handoffs and contained many repeated question marks.
problems.evidence: Round 340 regenerated work.md, reports/iteration_report.md, and reports/current_problem_audit.md from JSON truth sources and added reports/markdown_encoding_audit.json to the fixed audit chain.
problems.required_action: Keep audit_openusd_markdown_encoding.mjs in the validation chain; if it fails, stop promotion and regenerate the Markdown before continuing.

problems.summary: Many clicks still route to the local uncovered placeholder because the 406-page inventory does not contain every official Doxygen target.
problems.evidence: local_link_routing_report records uncovered links, while reading_flow_navigation_audit confirms completed-page primary reading paths now stay local and only explicit official-source links leave the site.
problems.required_action: Prioritize high-click navigation and TOC links for local anchors or inventory expansion; do not present placeholder routing as a finished reading experience.

problems.summary: Most remaining draft pages contain Chinese guidance and term notes, not paragraph-level bilingual translation. 297 pages remain draft_needs_translation and 11 remain draft_template_only.
problems.required_action: For selected high-value pages, replace or supplement guide-only blocks with dense paragraph-level bilingual coverage and then promote status only if the page passes the stricter rule.

problems.summary: The good_bilingual count is useful but still too broad to prove human-review-ready Chinese reading quality; English/Chinese ratio remains diagnostic only, not a hard failure.
problems.evidence: reports/english_debt_audit.json reports review_ready_zh=35, review_needs_zh_debt=63, release_review_ready_zh=23. ShadowAPI is review_ready_zh=true after round 397.
problems.required_action: Report review_ready_zh alongside good_bilingual; schedule EnglishDebtRound for pages missing section coverage or Chinese main reading path, not merely because English remains abundant.

problems.summary: Completion remains API-skewed while release/tutorial/user-guide pages still lag, although recent S2 rounds moved usdLux and tutorial pages forward.
problems.evidence: reports/english_debt_audit.json reports api_complete=72 and release_complete=26; release_review_ready_zh=23.
problems.required_action: Continue release/tutorial/user-guide PromotionRounds unless a named P0/P1 defect blocks the run.

problems.summary: validation_report.json previously used UTF-8 BOM, which broke standard Node JSON.parse.
problems.evidence: validate_openusd_api_repro.ps1 now writes UTF-8 without BOM; the latest validation report passed=true with failed_check_count=0.
problems.required_action: Keep validation_report.json BOM-free in every future validation run.

next_actions: Continue release/user-guide coverage because API complete remains much higher than release complete.
Prefer full_site/release/user_guides/schemas/usdLux/ShapingAPI.html for the next PromotionRound if it can become good_bilingual and preferably review_ready_zh.
Keep Markdown encoding, English debt, local link routing, and reading-flow navigation audits in the validation chain.
next_action: Next normal run should be a single PromotionRound targeting full_site/release/user_guides/schemas/usdLux/ShapingAPI.html if it can become good_bilingual and preferably review_ready_zh; do not batch-translate or silently switch pages.
